name: Signaturit eSignature API
what_it_does: European electronic signature platform with REST API — enabling businesses to send documents for e-signature with EU eIDAS compliance, including Simple, Advanced (AdES), and Qualified Electronic Signatures (QES), with SMS OTP authentication, biometric handwritten signatures, certified email delivery, and video signature capture for Spanish/European legal requirements.
use_cases: Sending EU eIDAS-compliant documents via Signaturit API for European contract management
Collecting qualified electronic signatures (QES) via Signaturit API for high-trust contracts
Implementing SMS OTP-authenticated signatures via Signaturit API for identity verification
Capturing biometric handwritten signatures via Signaturit API for in-person signing tablets
Generating certified email evidence via Signaturit API for Spanish legal document delivery
not_for: US-only businesses without EU legal requirements (use DocuSign or Dropbox Sign for US-only)
High-volume enterprise CLM (use DocuSign CLM for complex approval workflows)
Simple e-signatures without eIDAS compliance (use Signeasy or SignNow for simpler needs)
best_when: A European business (particularly Spanish) needs eIDAS-compliant e-signatures with Qualified Electronic Signature support and unique Spanish legal features like biometric signatures and certified email.
avoid_when: You're US-only, need enterprise CLM, or don't require EU eIDAS compliance.

auth.notes: API token via Authorization: Bearer header. Token from Signaturit dashboard. Sandbox environment (sandbox.signaturit.com) vs production (api.signaturit.com). No OAuth2 for API access. Webhooks for document events (sign, decline, expire, SMS verify). Widget embed for embedded signing. Multiple token environments: sandbox vs production use different tokens.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial: limited documents; Free plan: 10 documents/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter €49/month (50 docs); Pro €99/month (100 docs); Business €199/month (300 docs); Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Spanish company (Barcelona). Founded 2013. Part of Docuten Group. eIDAS compliant: Simple, Advanced, Qualified Electronic Signatures. Spanish specialization: biometric signature (handwritten on tablet), certified email (burofax digital). QES: involves third-party Trust Service Providers (TSPs). GDPR. 4,000+ companies. Used in Spain by banks, insurance, real estate, HR. Certified by Spanish FNMT (national mint) for PKI. 6 official SDKs. Sandbox for testing. Video signature: record video during signing for extra evidence. Spanish legal system focus (Civil Law).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Bearer token. Sandbox environment. eIDAS QES. Spanish company (EU). 6 official SDKs. Webhooks. Free plan (10 docs/month). Biometric signature unique. Spanish legal focus.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Signature reads idempotent by signature ID. Document reads idempotent. Sending not idempotent — check status before resending. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers.
known_agent_gotchas: Sandbox vs production: separate tokens and base URLs (sandbox.signaturit.com vs api.signaturit.com)
QES (Qualified Electronic Signature) involves external TSPs — additional configuration and cost
Biometric signature feature is unique to Spain/EU tablet signing use cases
Certified email (burofax) is a Spanish legal concept — verify applicability for your jurisdiction
eIDAS levels: Simple < Advanced < Qualified — choose appropriate level for legal requirements
Spanish documentation may be more complete than English docs for advanced features

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token with sandbox/production separation. eIDAS compliance (EU legal standard). GDPR compliant (Spanish company). QES uses third-party TSPs for highest trust level. Biometric data (handwritten signatures) — highest privacy sensitivity. EU data residency. Spanish FNMT PKI certification. Video signature creates additional evidence. No OAuth2.
